cleavage agent: The enzyme specificity was trypsin with two allowed missed cleavages
collision energy: HCD fragmentation with a normalized collision energy of 32
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation with a normalized collision energy of 32
instrument: coupled to a Fusion mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
reduction reagent: 100 mM dithiothreitol followed by 20 min at 4 °C
reduction concentration: 100 mM dithiothreitol followed by 20 min at 4 °C
